title: message
text: message Display the text of a message. MESsage MessageId Arguments MessageId —identifier of a text message in the current library and language. Description Display the text for message MessageId, that is $text ( MessageId ) , in the message frame and on the message line. If the MessageId cannot be found, no message is displayed. Example: Show the text of message 6865 in the current library and language: mes 6865 Copy Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
